prompt: Create a photorealistic medium portrait of a young woman standing outdoors in a sunlit garden café or patio, framed from the top of the head to just below the waist. She has a neat chin-length bob haircut in light brown, with smooth rounded ends and a center part. Her face is intentionally obscured by a flat opaque square censor block in warm medium brown, covering the entire facial area from forehead to chin while leaving the hair outline visible. She faces the camera directly with relaxed shoulders and arms down. She wears exactly 4 visible outfit/accessory elements: a sleeveless beige linen cropped tank top, a darker gray-brown inner cropped tank visible at the neckline and hem, loose gray-brown pants only partly visible at the bottom edge, and a short natural wooden-bead necklace. The background is a softly blurred leafy patio with potted plants, dappled sunlight, a pale umbrella in the upper right, and an outdoor table and chair to the right; use warm late-morning natural light, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, film-like colors, and a candid lifestyle photography look. Vertical portrait composition, 3:4 aspect ratio, no text, no signage, no watermark, no extra people.
